status_completed_or_failed_or_aborted_ha.name: status_completed_or_failed_or_aborted_has_completed_at
status_completed_or_failed_or_aborted_ha.value: ("processes"."status" in ('completed', 'failed', 'aborted') and "processes"."completed_at" is not null) or ("processes"."status" not in ('completed', 'failed', 'aborted') and "processes"."completed_at" is null)
